questions.q: Why won't the new indie game 'Mixtape' face a music-related delisting in the future?
options: The developer paid extra for perpetual licenses
Annapurna Interactive bought the record labels
The artists waived their licensing fees
questions.correctText: The developer paid extra for perpetual licenses

questions.q: In Forza Horizon 6, which natural element is intentionally made unbreakable to respect Japanese culture?

Which highly anticipated survival sequel recently sold over two million copies in its first 12 hours of Early Access?
